caption: Two men sit side-by-side in an indoor setting in front of a television displaying a neon-style sign that reads "STUPID REACTIONS". Behind them is a shelf filled with a collection of DVD or Blu-ray cases. The man on the left wears a dark green t-shirt and a thin necklace, while the man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a similar thin necklace. On-screen text labels the men as "@RICKSEGALL" and "@KORBINMILES" respectively, with a small pink Instagram logo positioned between them. Throughout the sequence, the man in green shifts his expression from a neutral look to a slight smirk and eventually touches his nose with his finger while looking toward the other man. The man in grey remains relatively still, maintaining a serious or skeptical expression. The lighting is bright and consistent across the scene.
